top_findings: Link verification inconclusive for 51 URLs (auth/rate-limit/server block); these are excluded from broken-link counts.

analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of docs.databricks.com covered 13,280 pages from a requested 27,525 (capped at 20,000 max). Critical issue: 6,512 confirmed broken internal documentation links detected across the site. API reference coverage is strong at 84.21% (3,572 API pages detected). Example code reliability estimated at 94.45% and freshness coverage at 96.19%. Overall audit confidence is 83.43%, with crawl confidence limited to 63.95% due to page cap constraints.
strengths: Strong API reference coverage at 84.21% with 3,572 API pages successfully detected
High example code reliability estimate of 94.45%
Excellent freshness metadata coverage at 96.19% of pages
risks: 6,512 confirmed broken internal documentation links create severe user navigation and trust issues
Crawl covered only 13,280 of 27,525 requested pages (48% coverage) due to 20,000 page limit
Crawl confidence at 63.95% indicates incomplete site coverage and potential blind spots
51 links unverified due to authentication, rate-limiting, or server blocks—may hide additional broken links
456 links excluded from analysis; exclusion criteria may mask documentation quality issues
Large gap between pages crawled and requested suggests significant uncrawled content areas
Multi-project topology mode may indicate fragmented documentation requiring cross-project link maintenance

prioritized_actions.action: Execute emergency broken link remediation campaign for 6,512 confirmed broken internal links
Investigate and resolve crawl limitations to cover remaining 14,245 requested pages beyond the cap
Implement automated link validation in CI/CD pipeline to prevent future link rot
Review and resolve 51 unverified links blocked by auth/rate-limits to confirm actual status
Audit 456 excluded links to validate exclusion criteria and ensure no critical links are ignored

limitations: External audit cannot verify links behind authentication walls or rate-limited endpoints (51 unverified links)
Crawl capped at 20,000 pages maximum; 14,245 requested pages remain unaudited and may contain additional issues
Cannot validate runtime correctness of code examples; 94.45% reliability is static analysis estimate only
Multi-project topology may have cross-project dependencies not fully captured in single audit pass
Confidence scores indicate incomplete coverage; actual documentation quality in uncrawled areas is unknown
